description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, featuring large black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A spacious wooden deck with white railings extends from the main living area, furnished with outdoor seating and a dining table. The interior layout includes an open-plan kitchen and living room, several bedrooms, and a bathroom, all finished with wood and white surfaces. The house is designed with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics. The main entrance is set back from the deck, accessible via a wooden door, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical but balanced.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a spacious wooden deck with white railings. The exterior is white with clean lines and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck with white railings, large windows, and the open-plan living and kitchen area visible through the glass.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid white wall, smaller windows, and the back entrance with less exterior detailing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main entrance door, additional windows, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the deck from another angle, the kitchen area, and a mix of large and small windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple wooden door, no steps, and is set back from a spacious deck with white railings and outdoor seating.
